name: Coronado Salad Ring
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Dry creamed cottage cheese (small curd)
1 cup Pastry cream (not whipped), I assume heavy cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the jellies in hot water.
2. Add the remaining ingredients in the order given: dry creamed cottage cheese, crushed pineapple, chopped walnuts, pastry cream, mayonnaise, and horseradish.
3. Place the mixture in a ring mold and refrigerate until firm.
4. When ready to serve, unmold onto a platter and fill the center with fresh strawberries.
5. Serves 8, needs no dressing.
